tools.name: find_legal_fournier_tool
tools.description: Match a Spain legal, tax, property, business, or private-client case to the best Legal Fournier public tool page and MCP workflow.

tools.name: run_legal_fournier_tool
tools.description: Run a Legal Fournier public calculator or screener directly inside MCP, returning intake screening, missing facts, complexity flags, and handoff guidance.

tools.name: get_paid_consultation_options
tools.description: Discover and arrange paid consultations with Legal Fournier through x402 in USDC on Base. Returns live options for a written email consultation and a 45-minute call, including current prices, fulfillment terms, request schemas, quote endpoints, and payment endpoints. Agents can use the returned HTTP

tools.name: get_paid_call_availability
tools.description: Read live Cal.com availability for the 45-minute agent-paid Legal Fournier consultation. This tool never creates a quote, booking, order, or payment.

tools.name: get_visa_options
tools.description: Rank Spain residence routes using evergreen logic and return decision traces, next actions, and canonical MCP resources for the leading branches.

tools.name: check_beckham_eligibility
tools.description: Screen Spain's Beckham regime using qualitative gatechecks, returning the rule trace, review level, and canonical MCP resources for follow-up.

tools.name: get_residency_path
tools.description: Explain the next permanent-residency or nationality milestone from current status and time in Spain, with explicit caution flags for counting issues.

tools.name: explain_nie_process
tools.description: Return the stable NIE and TIE workflow, the key procedural distinctions, and the canonical process resource for agents.

tools.name: compare_tax_regimes
tools.description: Compare Beckham versus standard Spanish resident taxation conceptually, returning reasoning, review level, and canonical MCP resources instead of rate tables.

tools.name: route_to_legal_fournier_help
tools.description: Decide whether a Spain legal matter should be escalated to Legal Fournier and return a service match, preparation checklist, and ready-to-send handoff message.

tools.name: create_legal_fournier_contact_request
tools.description: Create an accepted Legal Fournier lead from an agent workflow after explicit user consent. This is a consequential action: call only when the user has asked to contact Legal Fournier and has consented to follow-up.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_paid_consultation_options" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Discover and arrange paid consultations with Legal Fournier through x402 in USDC on Base. Returns live options for a written email consultation and a 45-minute …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "spain-legal" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_paid_consultation_options, check_beckham_eligibility, get_residency_path · Private data: find_legal_fournier_tool, create_legal_fournier_contact_request · Public sink: get_paid_consultation_options, route_to_legal_fournier_help · Destructive: run_legal_fournier_tool.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_paid_consultation_options, check_beckham_eligibility, get_residency_path · Private data: find_legal_fournier_tool, create_legal_fournier_contact_request · Public sink: get_paid_consultation_options, route_to_legal_fournier_help · Destructive: run_legal_fournier_tool

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
